name: Rich Custard Mango Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve sugar in the mixture of heavy cream and milk.
2. Beat egg yolks and add 1 cup of the cream mixture to them while continuously mixing.
3. Pour the remaining cream mixture into the yolk mixture.
4. Add almond flavoring.
5. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, for 8 minutes.
6. Allow the mixture to cool.
7. Whip evaporated milk and fold it into mangoes.
8. Add ginger to the mango mixture.
9. Fold the mango mixture into the cooled custard.
10. Freeze according to instructions for an ice cream maker. Makes 1 quart.
